summary: High‑quality front‑of‑house recording captures a solid, consistently good performance from start to finish.
review: Both reviewers praise the show as "good stuff from beginning to end" and award it four stars, indicating an enjoyable musical experience throughout. The recording is described in detail with Neumann KM140 microphones, an Aerco pre‑amp, and a Sony D‑10 Pro recorder, suggesting a crisp, professional FOH capture that sounds clear and well‑balanced.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent four‑star reviews highlight a solid performance and a high‑quality front‑of‑house recording; limited sample size yields medium confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FOB capture using Neumann KM140s, Aerco pre‑amp and Sony D‑10 Pro suggests a clear, professional mix with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note the show maintains its quality from start to finish; no specific set‑list criticisms or highlights were mentioned.
